history.content:
<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing up. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The safe open cell to my right is available, so I should turn right to face it and then navigate around the hazard.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D and, after the previous turn, I am now facing right. The cell in front of me is a wall at row 07 column E, so I cannot move forward. I need to find a safe open direction, and turning left will make me face up toward an open cell at row 06 column D.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing up at row 07 column D. The cell directly ahead is lava at row 06 column D, so I should not move forward. The safest available progress is to turn right and head toward the open corridor on the east side.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east at row 07 column D, and the cell ahead is a wall at column E, so moving forward is blocked. The cell to my left (north) is open at row 06 column D, so I should turn left to face a passable direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m back at row 07 column D facing north. The cell ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. Turning right will face east toward the open corridor, which is the only safe immediate direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing north. The cell ahead (row 06 column D) is safe floor, while the right side is blocked by a wall and the left side is lava. The best immediate move is to advance into the safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m still at row 07 column D facing north. The cell directly ahead is now row 06 column D, which is floor and safe. The left side is lava and the right side is a wall, so continuing forward is the only sensible move.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m still facing north at row 07 column D. The cell ahead is safe floor, while the right is blocked and the left is lava. I should move forward again.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m still at row 07 column D facing north. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is safe floor. I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing north, and the path ahead at row 06 column D is clear. I should keep moving forward toward the open area and eventual goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing north. The cell ahead is row 06 column D, which is safe floor, so moving forward is still the best action.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing north, and the cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The open safe space is to my left at row 07 column C, so I need to turn left to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing west now, and the cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell. Moving forward gets me closer toward the open area and keeps me away from lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
